meta.title: Generate AI Video Worlds Live in Real-Time (PixVerse R1)
meta.description:
Now you can direct generative AI video in real-time, guiding scenes as they generate in real time. Pixverse R1 creates a new experience that combines watching a movie, playing a game, writing a screenplay -- all in one surreal stream-of-consciousness fever dream. Just like the early days of motion pictures, these are the early days for a "new camera" that let's you build interactive, immersive worlds on-the-fly. The quality is closer to AI video two or three years ago, which is great news if you love unpredictable, weird, surrealism (I do!). 

🛠️ Tools
PixVerse https://app.pixverse.ai/
PixVerse R1 https://realtime.pixverse.ai/

🤖 Sign-up for my newsletter and get my free AI Video Prompt Sidekick for ChatGPT and get notified about my AI filmmaking courses
https://aivideoschool.xyz

🍿 AI Movies and How I Made Them
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZrJsckCh5RzcTWyiaBqQ-zSGE-U0FsAg 

🎓 AI Video Tutorials, Comparisons, Workflows
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZrJsckCh5RwGHkhWM7SB6-FFycNdagTF 

📚 Chapters
00:00 What excites me about PixVerse R1
00:50 Real-time generative AI video is now part of the history of the motion picture
01:56 Live generating: "Can you wake him up?"
04:39 Live generating: "Toyko Streets"
05:25 Live generating from a Custom World in PixVerse R1
07:32 Downloading real-time videos from your history in Pixverse R1
07:47 What makes interactive world models different from AI video

#PixVerse #PixVerseRealtime #WorldModels #AIVideo #GenerativeAI #AIFilmmaking #RealtimeAI  #AICinema #AIVideoSchool #VideoCreation #Filmmaking #CreatorTools #FutureOfVideo #AIContentCreation

I want to be clear, my excitement comes not from the current results, but from the promise of a new kind of entertainment that's part movie, part video game, but something that's also neither of those things.
